ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network configuration */,
  "cqi_index" INTEGER /* Channel Quality Indicator (CQI) index */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the modulation and code rate combination */,
  "min_snr" REAL /* Minimum Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) required for reliable communication */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput achieved by the configuration */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES network_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modulation_schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modulation scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the modulation scheme (e.g., QPSK, 16-QAM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modulation scheme */,
  "bandwidth_efficiency" REAL /* Bandwidth efficiency of the modulation scheme */,
  "power_efficiency" REAL /* Power efficiency of the modulation scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network configuration */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the modulation scheme used */,
  "code_rate" REAL /* Code rate used in the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_configurations_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES modulation_schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation scenario */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation scenario */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_scenarios_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES network_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation scenario */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput achieved in the simulation */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate in the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES simulation_scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network configuration */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view the configuration */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES network_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_entries" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network configuration */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_entries_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES network_configurations ("config_id")
)
